description: Create a comprehensive FULL_ARCHITECTURE_MAP.md file at the project root that documents the entire CRM system architecture. This single large markdown file must cover: (1) Database schema - every table name, key columns, relationships/foreign keys, (2) All API routes with HTTP methods, what tables they read/write, (3) All frontend pages listing what API routes they call, (4) UI elements/buttons on each page and what actions they trigger, (5) Connection maps showing the full data flow from button to route to table, (6) Missing/broken items - routes called but not existing, tables with no API, pages with dead buttons, disconnected features.
steps: Read all schema files in drizzle/schema/ to catalog every table name, columns, and foreign key relationships. There are 34 schema files exporting approximately 120+ tables.
Scan all 314 API route files in app/api/ to catalog: route path, HTTP methods (GET/POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE), which schema tables they import/use, what auth they require.

Scan all tenant pages in app/tenant/ (90+ pages) and superadmin pages in app/superadmin/ (24 pages) to catalog: page path, which client components they use, which API routes they call (via fetch or direct DB queries).

For the key tenant pages (leads, contacts, deals, companies, tasks, tickets, invoices, orders, contracts, subscriptions, products, quotes, forms, automation, workflows, reports, settings), document the buttons/actions available and what they trigger.

Create the FULL_ARCHITECTURE_MAP.md file with these sections: (a) Overview/Table of Contents, (b) Database Schema (grouped by domain: core, crm, automation, communication, billing, marketing, support, infrastructure, etc.), (c) API Routes (grouped by domain with method + path + tables used), (d) Frontend Pages (grouped by area with routes called), (e) UI Actions Map (key buttons/forms and their data flow), (f) Connection Diagram (text-based showing Button -> Route -> Table flows), (g) Gaps & Issues (missing connections, dead routes, orphan tables).

In the Gaps & Issues section, identify: routes that reference tables not in schema, pages that call routes that do not exist, tables that have no API CRUD routes, duplicate route paths (super-admin vs superadmin), and features that appear partially implemented.
acceptance_criteria: FULL_ARCHITECTURE_MAP.md exists at the project root
The file contains a table of contents with links to all major sections
Every table from drizzle/schema/ is listed with its key columns and foreign keys
Every API route from app/api/ is listed with its HTTP methods and the tables it touches
Every frontend page is listed with what routes/APIs it connects to
A Gaps & Issues section identifies at least 5 concrete problems (missing routes, dead buttons, disconnected tables, etc.)
The file is properly formatted markdown that renders correctly
verification: Check that FULL_ARCHITECTURE_MAP.md exists and has more than 2000 lines (given the system's complexity)
Verify the markdown has proper headings, table formatting, and a table of contents
findings: Created 3798-line FULL_ARCHITECTURE_MAP.md at project root. Documented 155+ tables across 35 schema files, all 314 API route files with HTTP methods and table connections, 119 tenant pages and 24 superadmin pages with their API dependencies, UI action maps for key pages, data flow diagrams, and identified 9 categories of gaps/issues including duplicate route namespaces (super-admin vs superadmin), schema-only features with no API, and missing FK constraints.
